cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count WHERE order_count > 5 MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_total RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, avg_order_total ORDER BY avg_order_total DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c, COUNT(o) AS order_count NEXT MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_total NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, avg_order_total ORDER BY avg_order_total DESC

cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, SUM(sup.supply_price * sup.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN s.name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN s, SUM(sup.supply_price) AS total_supply_value NEXT RETURN s.name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE category_count >= 3 AND total_spent > 2000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, COUNT(cat) AS category_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, COUNT(m) AS movieCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE movieCount >= 5 RETURN d.name AS directorName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC
gql: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) RETURN d, COUNT(m) AS movieCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating NEXT RETURN d.name AS directorName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC

cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2000 WITH d, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating RETURN d.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.`year` > 2000 RETURN d, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating NEXT RETURN d.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount MATCH (u)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score >= 9 WITH u, genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN u.username, genreCount
gql: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN u, COUNT(g) AS genreCount NEXT MATCH (u)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score >= 9 RETURN u, genreCount NEXT RETURN u.username, genreCount

cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WHERE m.year >= 1990 AND m.year <= 2010 WITH a, SUM(w.watchDuration) AS totalWatchDuration RETURN a.name, totalWatchDuration ORDER BY totalWatchDuration DESC LIMIT 10

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, supplier_count ORDER BY supplier_count DESC
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) RETURN p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count NEXT MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, supplier_count ORDER BY supplier_count DESC

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c.loyalty_tier AS tier, COUNT(c) AS customer_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(o) AS total_orders WHERE customer_count > 10 RETURN tier, avg_order_value, total_orders ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c.loyalty_tier AS tier, COUNT(c) AS customer_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(o) AS total_orders NEXT RETURN tier, avg_order_value, total_orders ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(s.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_inventory_value
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN s, COUNT(cat) AS category_count, SUM(s.stock_quantity) AS total_inventory_value ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 3 NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_inventory_value

cypher: MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold WITH DISTINCT e, s RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name
gql: MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o RETURN DISTINCT e, s NEXT RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, COLLECT(DISTINCT cat.name) AS categories WHERE total_spent > 5000 AND NOT 'Electronics' IN categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH o, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count, o.payment_method AS payment_method WHERE category_count >= 3 WITH payment_method, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value RETURN payment_method, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, SUM(s.supply_price * s.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN sup, SUM(s.supply_price) AS total_supply_value NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3

cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT st) AS store_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) RETURN s, COUNT(st) AS store_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products NEXT RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, categories_purchased RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, categories_purchased ORDER BY total_spent DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, COUNT(cat) AS categories_purchased NEXT MATCH (all_cats:Category) RETURN c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories NEXT MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, categories_purchased NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, categories_purchased ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH p, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue RETURN p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.category AS category, total_quantity_sold, total_revenue ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)<-[:Contains]-(o:`Order`) RETURN p, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue NEXT RETURN p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.category AS category, total_quantity_sold, total_revenue ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE store_count >= 5 AND total_spent > 5000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) RETURN c, COUNT(s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, store_count ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) RETURN sup, COUNT(s) AS store_count NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, store_count ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH c MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name <> 'Books' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category{name:'Electronics'}) RETURN c NEXT MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name <> 'Books' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name

gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN sup, SUM(s.supply_price) AS total_supply_value, p, c ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, total_supply_value

gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op RETURN s, COUNT(p) AS understocked_product_count, SUM(p.price) AS total_understocked_value NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, understocked_product_count, total_understocked_value

cypher: MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH cat, p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count = 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat) WITH cat, COUNT(p) AS exclusive_product_count RETURN cat.name AS category_name, exclusive_product_count

gql: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN s, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products NEXT RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 5

gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS threshold

gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[p:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[co:Contains]->(pr:`Product`) RETURN c, COUNT(o) AS order_count, SUM(co.line_total) AS total_spending, AVG(co.line_total) AS average_order_value NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, order_count, total_spending, average_order_value ORDER BY total_spending DESC LIMIT 10

cypher: MATCH (c:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price RETURN c.name AS category_name, avg_price ORDER BY avg_price DESC

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, category_count, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE category_count = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, COUNT(cat) AS category_count NEXT MATCH (all_cats:Category) RETURN c, category_count, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, category_count

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, COUNT(o) AS order_count WHERE order_count > 5 MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_amount RETURN c.name AS customer_name, avg_order_amount ORDER BY avg_order_amount DESC

cypher: MATCH (d:Director {name: 'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH m MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m) WITH u, COUNT(m) AS watchedCount MATCH (d:Director {name: 'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) WITH u, watchedCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies WHERE watchedCount = totalMovies RETURN u.username, watchedCount
gql: MATCH (d:Director{name:'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN m NEXT MATCH (u:User)-[w:WATCHED]->(m) RETURN u, COUNT(m) AS watchedCount NEXT MATCH (d:Director{name:'Annette Meyer'})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie) RETURN u, watchedCount, COUNT(m) AS totalMovies NEXT RETURN u.username, watchedCount

cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, m, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE avgRating >= 7 WITH d, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount RETURN d.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) RETURN d, m, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating NEXT RETURN d, COUNT(m) AS highRatedMovieCount NEXT RETURN d.name, highRatedMovieCount ORDER BY highRatedMovieCount DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN u.username AS username, COUNT(m) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 10
gql: MATCH (u:User)-[:REVIEWED]->(m:Movie) RETURN u.username AS username, COUNT(m) AS reviewCount ORDER BY reviewCount DESC LIMIT 10

cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WITH d, COUNT(m) AS movieCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating WHERE movieCount >= 5 RETURN d.name AS directorName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC
gql: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) RETURN d, COUNT(m) AS movieCount, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating NEXT RETURN d.name AS directorName, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC

cypher: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.year > 2000 WITH d, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating RETURN d.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (d:Director)-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie)<-[r:RATED]-(:User) WHERE m.`year` > 2000 RETURN d, AVG(r.score) AS avgRating NEXT RETURN d.name, avgRating ORDER BY avgRating DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) WITH u, COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS genreCount MATCH (u)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score >= 9 WITH u, genreCount WHERE genreCount >= 3 RETURN u.username, genreCount
gql: MATCH (u:User)-[:WATCHED]->(m:Movie)-[:BELONGS_TO_GENRE]->(g:Genre) RETURN u, COUNT(g) AS genreCount NEXT MATCH (u)-[r:RATED]->(m:Movie) WHERE r.score >= 9 RETURN u, genreCount NEXT RETURN u.username, genreCount

cypher: MATCH (a:Actor)-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie)<-[w:WATCHED]-(:User) WHERE m.year >= 1990 AND m.year <= 2010 WITH a, SUM(w.watchDuration) AS totalWatchDuration RETURN a.name, totalWatchDuration ORDER BY totalWatchDuration DESC LIMIT 10

gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:AssessesRisk]->(a:Account)-[:Triggered]->(ra1:RiskAssessment{risk_level:'high'}) RETURN c, COUNT(ra1) AS high_risk_triggers NEXT RETURN c.name, high_risk_triggers

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, SUM(s.supply_price * s.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN sup, SUM(s.supply_price) AS total_supply_value NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, total_supply_value ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 3

cypher: MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold WITH DISTINCT e, s RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name
gql: MATCH (e:Employee)-[:WorksAt]->(s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o RETURN DISTINCT e, s NEXT RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Contains]-(o:Order) WITH p, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue RETURN p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.category AS category, total_quantity_sold, total_revenue ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)<-[:Contains]-(o:`Order`) RETURN p, SUM(o.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold, SUM(o.line_total) AS total_revenue NEXT RETURN p.name AS product_name, p.brand AS brand, p.category AS category, total_quantity_sold, total_revenue ORDER BY total_quantity_sold DESC LIMIT 10

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count > 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, supplier_count ORDER BY supplier_count DESC
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) RETURN p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count NEXT MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN p.name AS product_name, cat.name AS category_name, supplier_count ORDER BY supplier_count DESC

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, COLLECT(DISTINCT cat.name) AS categories WHERE total_spent > 5000 AND NOT 'Electronics' IN categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c.loyalty_tier AS tier, COUNT(c) AS customer_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(o) AS total_orders WHERE customer_count > 10 RETURN tier, avg_order_value, total_orders ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c.loyalty_tier AS tier, COUNT(c) AS customer_count, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value, COUNT(o) AS total_orders NEXT RETURN tier, avg_order_value, total_orders ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count, SUM(s.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 3 RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_inventory_value
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN s, COUNT(cat) AS category_count, SUM(s.stock_quantity) AS total_inventory_value ORDER BY category_count DESC LIMIT 3 NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, category_count, total_inventory_value

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, categories_purchased RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, categories_purchased ORDER BY total_spent DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, COUNT(cat) AS categories_purchased NEXT MATCH (all_cats:Category) RETURN c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories NEXT MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`) RETURN c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent, categories_purchased NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent, categories_purchased ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH o, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count, o.payment_method AS payment_method WHERE category_count >= 3 WITH payment_method, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value RETURN payment_method, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC
gql: MATCH (o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN o, COUNT(c) AS category_count, o.payment_method AS payment_method NEXT RETURN payment_method, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value NEXT RETURN payment_method, avg_order_value ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC

cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT st) AS store_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(st:Store) RETURN s, COUNT(st) AS store_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products NEXT RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, store_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH c, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price RETURN c.name AS category_name, avg_price ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN c, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price NEXT RETURN c.name AS category_name, avg_price ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, store_count ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) RETURN sup, COUNT(s) AS store_count NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, store_count ORDER BY store_count DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category {name: 'Electronics'}) WITH c MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(:Order)-[:Contains]->(:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name <> 'Books' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(:Category{name:'Electronics'}) RETURN c NEXT MATCH (c)-[:Purchases]->(:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WHERE cat.name <> 'Books' RETURN DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent WHERE store_count >= 5 AND total_spent > 5000 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)<-[:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) RETURN c, COUNT(s) AS store_count, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spent NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, total_spent ORDER BY total_spent DESC

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product) WITH c, pur.channel AS channel, SUM(p.price * pur.quantity) AS total_spent WHERE channel IS NOT NULL RETURN c.name AS customer_name, channel, total_spent ORDER BY c.name, channel
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[pur:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`) RETURN c, pur.channel AS channel, SUM(p.price) AS total_spent NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, channel, total_spent ORDER BY c.name, channel

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH sup, SUM(s.supply_price * s.minimum_order_quantity) AS total_supply_value, p, c ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, total_supply_value
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[s:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN sup, SUM(s.supply_price) AS total_supply_value, p, c ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC LIMIT 5 NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, total_supply_value

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WITH s, SUM(o.stock_quantity * p.price) AS total_inventory_value, COUNT(DISTINCT c) AS category_count RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_inventory_value, category_count ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN s, SUM(o.stock_quantity) AS total_inventory_value, COUNT(c) AS category_count NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_inventory_value, category_count ORDER BY total_inventory_value DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)<-[s:Supplies]-(sup:Supplier) WITH p, COLLECT(sup.name) AS suppliers WHERE SIZE(suppliers) > 1 RETURN p.name AS product_name, suppliers

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spending, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS category_count WHERE category_count >= 3 RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, total_spending, category_count ORDER BY total_spending DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_spending, COUNT(cat) AS category_count NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, c.loyalty_tier AS loyalty_tier, total_spending, category_count ORDER BY total_spending DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op.reorder_threshold WITH s, COUNT(p) AS understocked_product_count, SUM(p.price * op.stock_quantity) AS total_understocked_value RETURN s.name AS store_name, understocked_product_count, total_understocked_value
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE op.stock_quantity < op RETURN s, COUNT(p) AS understocked_product_count, SUM(p.price) AS total_understocked_value NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, understocked_product_count, total_understocked_value

cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH s, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 5
gql: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN s, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price, COUNT(p) AS total_products NEXT RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price, total_products ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 5

cypher: MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:Product)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) WITH cat, p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count WHERE supplier_count = 1 MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat) WITH cat, COUNT(p) AS exclusive_product_count RETURN cat.name AS category_name, exclusive_product_count
gql: MATCH (cat:Category)<-[:BelongsTo]-(p:`Product`)<-[:Supplies]-(s:Supplier) RETURN cat, p, COUNT(s) AS supplier_count NEXT MATCH (p)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat) RETURN cat, COUNT(p) AS exclusive_product_count NEXT RETURN cat.name AS category_name, exclusive_product_count

cypher: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:Order)-[:Contains]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT cat) AS categories_purchased MATCH (all_cats:Category) WITH c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories WHERE categories_purchased = total_categories RETURN c.name AS customer_name, categories_purchased
gql: MATCH (c:Customer)-[:Purchases]->(o:`Order`)-[:Contains]->(p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(cat:Category) RETURN c, COUNT(cat) AS categories_purchased NEXT MATCH (all_cats:Category) RETURN c, categories_purchased, COUNT(all_cats) AS total_categories NEXT RETURN c.name AS customer_name, categories_purchased

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS threshold
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS threshold

cypher: MATCH (p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN c.name AS category_name, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY average_price DESC
gql: MATCH (p:`Product`)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) RETURN c.name AS category_name, AVG(p.price) AS average_price ORDER BY average_price DESC

cypher: MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.capacity > 300 AND w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name, w.start_date AS start_date
gql: MATCH (e:Employee)-[w:WorksAt]->(s:Store) WHERE s.capacity > 300 AND w.start_date < date('2022-01-01') RETURN e.name AS employee_name, e.role AS role, s.name AS store_name, w.start_date AS start_date

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o.reorder_threshold RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS reorder_threshold
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[o:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) WHERE o.stock_quantity < o RETURN s.name AS store_name, p.name AS product_name, o.stock_quantity AS current_stock, o.reorder_threshold AS reorder_threshold

cypher: MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, MIN(op.stock_quantity) AS min_stock WHERE min_stock >= 1 MATCH (s)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:Product) WITH s, COUNT(p) AS total_products RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_products
gql: MATCH (s:Store)-[op:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) RETURN s, MIN(op.stock_quantity) AS min_stock NEXT MATCH (s)-[:OperatesIn]->(p:`Product`) RETURN s, COUNT(p) AS total_products NEXT RETURN s.name AS store_name, total_products

cypher: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) WITH sup, s, AVG(p.price) AS avg_product_price WHERE avg_product_price > 50 MATCH (sup)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:Product) WITH sup, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS product_count, AVG(sp.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price
gql: MATCH (sup:Supplier)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:`Product`)<-[op:OperatesIn]-(s:Store) RETURN sup, s, AVG(p.price) AS avg_product_price NEXT MATCH (sup)-[sp:Supplies]->(p:`Product`) RETURN sup, COUNT(p) AS product_count, AVG(sp.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price NEXT RETURN sup.name AS supplier_name, product_count, avg_supply_price

cypher: MATCH (s:Supplier)-[sup:Supplies]->(p:Product)-[:BelongsTo]->(c:Category) WHERE c.name CONTAINS 'Electronics' WITH s, AVG(sup.supply_price) AS avg_supply_price RETURN s.name AS supplier_name, s.reliability_score AS reliability_score, s.contract_terms AS contract_terms, avg_supply_price ORDER BY avg_supply_price DESC LIMIT 5
